title: Death Animations [WIP]
description: Mobs have new epic animations when they die! Inspired by iChun's Mob Dismemberment.
body:
# Death Animations > A data pack for Minecraft 1.16x / 1.17x!
YouTube videos ⚠ These videos showcase an early version of this data pack. Obvious bugs are mostly fixed by now.



Video on bilibili.com by 苏打BAKA
### ⚠ This data pack is currently going through an extremely slow complete rewrite for Minecraft 1.21! [Public test builds are available here](https://github.com/Tschipcraft/deathanimations_test). ### If you like what you see, feel free to leave a follow to be notified when the update is ready!

‌‌ Features

Mobs have new, _epic_ animations when they die. Inspired by [iChun's Mob Dismemberment mod](https://ichun.me/mods/mob-dismemberment/). **Works with:** Zombies, Husks, Skeletons, Strays, Creepers, Drowned, Spiders, Cave Spiders, Phantoms, Villagers, Pillagers, Evokers, Vindicators, Illusioners, Pigs, Cows, Chicken, Sheep, Iron Golem, Ravagers and Endermites. Most body parts can be picked up with a right-click. You can also use them inside a crafting table or even eat them. ## Installation Install either as: * **Data Pack [DP]** ➜ * Place main data pack `.zip` in your world's `datapacks` folder * Drop resource pack `.zip` into your `resourcepack` folder * Activate the resource pack ingame * **Mod [Mod]** ➜ Drop into your `mods` folder To manage settings, use `/trigger settings`. ## Issues If you encounter an issue in v1.4 there is a likely chance it has already been fixed in the rewrite! If you find an issue in the rewrite, feel free to submit an issue. ## Compatibility For Minecraft 1.14x and 1.15x use [a legacy edition (Mediafire)](https://www.mediafire.com/folder/o5q5w0qv12ptt/Legacy_(1.14_-_1.15)). Update to Minecraft 1.21x in progress! ## External Links
